summary: Completed Screen 1 backend and frontend validation on public URL for Login + Role Access scope. All 6 credentials authenticate, role selection renders correctly with one active role and five locked cards, mock JSON block is visible, and logout reliably returns to login.
action_items: Proceed to next build step (Google Sheets OAuth flow) after this Screen 1 baseline.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py remains very large (>2000 lines). Split v1/v2/v3 domains into smaller router/service modules for safer maintenance and lower regression risk.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created in this iteration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Screen 1 is stable on public URL. Use role credentials from this run for next-phase tests. Focus next on Google Sheets OAuth and downstream role dashboards.
rca of the issue: No functional blocker found in requested Screen 1 scope. One temporary internal test assumption failed initially because /api/v3/auth/me does not exist; test was corrected to validate session access via protected /api/v3/verticals endpoint and logout invalidation.
